retrieved_result: Princess & Superhero Cakes Princess & Superhero Cakeswith Avalon Yarnes How adorable — not to mention impressive — are these cakes? You don’t have to love manga and anime to be blown away by these cartoony characters with oversized heads, a style known as chibi. Let Avalon teach you how to make them for the little superhero o
Decision_Reason: The page discusses princess and superhero cake decorating (chibi style) and does not address TikTok trends for 2024.
